item.title: Day4
item.description: Day 4: March 6, 2024 Today’s Progress: Successfully added database connectivity and display tasks on homepage. Thoughts: Need to troubleshoot priority functionality, due date display, and need to create edit and delete functionality. Link to work
item.content:
Day 4: March 6, 2024

Today’s Progress: Successfully added database connectivity and display tasks on homepage.

Thoughts: Need to troubleshoot priority functionality, due date display, and need to create edit and delete functionality.

Link to work

item.title: Day3
item.description: 100 Days Of Code - Log Day 3: March 5,2024 Today’s Progress: Added tasks database schema using SQLAlchemy. Thoughts: Going to create database models so tables are created when container is launched. Link to work
item.content:
100 Days Of Code - Log

Day 3: March 5,2024

Today’s Progress: Added tasks database schema using SQLAlchemy.

Thoughts: Going to create database models so tables are created when container is launched.

Link to work

item.title: Day2
item.description: 100 Days Of Code - Log Day 2: March 4,2024 Today’s Progress: Added wtforms library ToDo app and converted the new_task.html page into a template. Thoughts: Going to create a database for the application and link the form to it. Link to work
item.content:
100 Days Of Code - Log

Day 2: March 4,2024

Today’s Progress: Added wtforms library ToDo app and converted the new_task.html page into a template.

Thoughts: Going to create a database for the application and link the form to it.

Link to work

item.title: Day1
item.description: 100 Days Of Code - Log Day 1: March 3,2024 Today’s Progress: Worked on site theme and pages. Thoughts: Going to now move on to working on Simple ToDo app. Link to work
item.content:
100 Days Of Code - Log

Thoughts: Going to now move on to working on Simple ToDo app.

item.title: Day0
item.description: 100 Days Of Code - Log Day 0: March 2,2024 Today’s Progress: Created base site framework. Thoughts: Going to work on editing the theme and removing unnecessary elements. Link to work
item.content:
100 Days Of Code - Log

Day 0: March 2,2024

Today’s Progress: Created base site framework.
